pr.title: Get Jira Data Center Resolver working in OHE
pr.body: ## Summary Makes the Jira Data Center PAT/webhook flow usable as a first-class integration path. - fixes email-match user resolution when Jira DC OAuth is disabled - expands repository inference for self-hosted Git, GitLab, GitHub Enterprise, and Bitbucket Data Center URLs - always starts a fresh conversation for each `@openhands` Jira DC mention - adds account-not-linked fallback handling with an acknowledgement reaction - adds service-account PAT webhook setup, transient admin PAT auto-enrollment, and stored-token preservation on edit - injects Jira issue comment history into the agent prompt and frames label-triggered issues as the task - redesigns the Jira DC setup UI with auto-populated host/service-account values, a table summary, and an edit modal - includes a one-line CI stabilization for current `main` good-first-issue label sorting, which was blocking the generic Python test job ## Validation Successful end to end testing in a real OHE instance and a real Jira Data center instance. [x] Human tested changes https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/53f72f31-c370-4c58-8d5a-24f647c071db https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/62f6bd9e-4825-4d60-8a19-6feba079d463 - `env PYTHONPATH=enterprise:. uv run --with python-keycloak --with pytest-asyncio --with aiosqlite --with limits --with coredis pytest enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_manager.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_view.py enterprise/tests/unit/server/routes/test_jira_dc_integration_routes.py enterprise/tests/unit/test_utils.py -q` -> 121 passed - `env PYTHONPATH=enterprise:. uv run ruff check --config enterprise/dev_config/python/ruff.toml ...` on affected Jira DC files/tests - `env PYTHONPATH=enterprise:. uv run ruff format --check --config enterprise/dev_config/python/ruff.toml ...` on affected Jira DC files/tests - `env PYTHONPATH=enterprise:. uv run --with types-requests mypy --config-file enterprise/dev_config/python/mypy.ini enterprise/integrations/jira_dc/jira_dc_manager.py enterprise/server/routes/integration/jira_dc.py` - `env PYTHONPATH=enterprise:. uv run pytest tests/unit/test_issue_good_first_issue_check_openhands.py -q` -> 7 passed --- To run this PR locally, use the following command: GUI with Docker: ``` docker run -it --rm -p 3000:3000 -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway --name openhands-app-6bacf01 docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:6bacf01 ```
pr.author: ak684
